name: Fruited Shortbread Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine flour, baking soda, and cream of tartar in a bowl.
3. In another large bowl, beat butter and sugar until fluffy. Add egg.
4. Stir in vanilla and crumbled mincemeat.
5. Add the dry ingredients. Mix well; batter will be stiff.
6. Roll into 1 1/4-inch balls. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet, flattening slightly.
7. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until lightly browned.
8. While still warm, cover with a glaze of confectioners sugar mixed with milk and vanilla.
